content:
The scarecrow is another great symbol, especially because it represents how we often fear things that aren’t as scary as we think. Phoenix’s reaction to the scarecrow shows that she’s not only strong but also able to laugh at herself and move past fear. Once she realizes it’s harmless, she brushes it off and continues on, which is a perfect example of how she doesn’t let things that seem threatening hold her back. It shows her resilience and ability to keep going, no matter how things might look at first.

I also think these symbols speak to the bigger picture of Phoenix’s journey being both physical and emotional. Her love for her grandson is the driving force behind her, but the struggles she faces along the way also show how much inner strength and sacrifice it takes to keep going for someone you love. Phoenix’s ability to face both literal and figurative obstacles really highlights her determination and love.
